prompt: A hand-drawn manga page on off-white notebook paper, created entirely with rough blue ballpoint pen lines, messy teenage doodle energy, uneven panel borders, scratchy shading, exaggerated action effects, and intentionally amateur "cringe black-history notebook" style. The page has 6 panels total arranged vertically: 1 wide top panel, 1 wide second panel, 1 wide third panel, 1 narrow horizontal impact panel, and 2 small bottom panels side by side. In the top panel, a round cute hero resembling a pink puffball swordsman crouches dramatically at left with a long sword planted upward behind him, glaring intensely, while a delinquent-looking or office-worker man with curly hair stands at right in a shirt, tie, and slacks, hands in pockets, on a barren rocky plain with sketchy clouds and speed-scratch background. In the second panel, the round swordsman leaps diagonally through the air with the sword raised, surrounded by vertical motion lines; large handwritten Japanese sound-effect text fills the panel with exactly 2 text groups: "断タネ" on the left and "超時空" on the right. In the third panel, the hero flies low from left to right and releases a piercing energy slash or scream-like attack toward the man on the right; across the panel is 1 giant handwritten Japanese shout: "ズギャアアアン!!!". In the fourth narrow panel, the entire frame is filled with smoke, impact scribbles, and explosive chaos, with 1 large handwritten Japanese effect: "ドォォォン!!!". In the bottom-left panel, after the smoke clears, the man is unharmed and casually catches or stops the tiny sword between two fingers near his face; a tiny handwritten caption appears near the fingers reading "ピタ…". In the bottom-right panel, the round hero appears in close-up, shocked and screaming with huge eyes, sweat, and dark streaked shading on the face; along the right side is 1 vertical handwritten Japanese reaction: "なっ!?". Keep the faces on the human character obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. Overall tone: comedic overdramatic battle manga parody, middle-school notebook doodle, chaotic composition, monochrome blue-ink pen sketch, no polished digital rendering, visible scribbles and imperfect anatomy.
